resourceTemplates.name: get-all-lists-in-site
resourceTemplates.title: Get all lists in site
resourceTemplates.description: Returns all Microsoft Lists in the site, including their name and web URL. Only key properties.

resourceTemplates.name: get-list-details
resourceTemplates.title: Get list details
resourceTemplates.description: Gets the most relevant details for a single Microsoft List.

resourceTemplates.name: get-list-columns
resourceTemplates.title: Get list columns
resourceTemplates.description: Returns all column definitions for the list, showing only the relevant info.
